app.title: FlowCast - River flow forcast
app.noStations: No stations found. Add a CEHQ station to get started.

chat.title: Chat
chat.subtitle: Ask about rivers, flows, and conditions
chat.emptyHeading: What would you like to paddle?
chat.emptySubtext: Try one of these to get started:
chat.starter1: Which rivers near me are good to paddle right now?
chat.starter2: What will be the best river this weekend?
chat.starter3: Which of my favorite rivers has the best flow?
chat.starter4: I have 2 hours to drive — what should I paddle?
chat.locationDenied: Location unavailable — tell me where you are

myRivers.emptySubtext: Explore rivers and tap the star to add them here

subscribe.enterEmail: Enter your email to receive river flow notifications.
subscribe.confirmationSent: We sent a confirmation link to {email}. Click it to verify your email, then come back and tap the bell on any river to get notified.

confirmed.title: Email verified!
confirmed.message: Your email is confirmed. Go back to the app and tap the bell icon on any river card to choose which rivers you want notifications for.

notifications.title: Preferences
notifications.noRivers: No rivers subscribed yet. Click the bell icon on a river card to subscribe.
notifications.digestMode: Batch alerts into a daily digest
notifications.noToken: No token provided. Use the link from your confirmation email.
notifications.comingSoonMessage: Push notifications are coming soon on mobile. In the meantime, you can subscribe to email alerts from the web version.
notifications.emailDisabledHint: Add an email below to enable email notifications.
notifications.notificationTypesHint: Choose which alerts you want to receive.

itsOn.label: It's on!
itsOn.description: A river just entered runnable range.

safetyWarning.label: Safety warning
safetyWarning.description: Flow has exceeded the safe paddling max.

runnableInNDays.label: Runnable soon
runnableInNDays.description: Predicted to become runnable within your lead time.

weekendForecast.label: Weekend forecast
weekendForecast.description: Weekly digest of upcoming weekend windows.

rainBump.label: Rain incoming
rainBump.description: Heavy rain expected — flow may rise.

droppingOut.label: Dropping out
droppingOut.description: Currently runnable, expected to drop out in 12–24h.

detail.noDataYet: No data yet. Press Refresh to fetch flow data and forecast from CEHQ.
detail.runningHigh: Running high — send it, but stay sharp!
detail.noRapids: No rapids on this river yet

rapids.name: Name
rapids.clickPathToAdd: Click on or near the river path to add a rapid. Drag a marker to move it.
rapids.lockedHint: This feature is in preview. Open Settings → Beta features and enable Rapids to unlock it.

beta.title: Beta features
beta.empty: No beta features available right now.

admin.deleteConfirmMessage: This will permanently delete "{name}" and all its data (forecasts, subscriptions, flow readings). This cannot be undone.

slide1.title: Plan your next paddle
slide1.body: FlowCast shows real-time flow and weather for rivers so you can find the perfect run.

slide2.title: Know when it's runnable
slide2.body: Each river card shows its status at a glance. The coloured pill tells you if it's runnable; the bar places today's flow between the min, ideal and max.

slide3.title: Save your favourites
slide3.body: Star rivers to pin them in My Rivers — and get notified when they hit your sweet spot.
